description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This Tenet is based on the rationale of protecting against misalignment risks that arise when a stakeholder occupies two or more ecosystem roles, each of which has different mandates and inner incentives. Such misalignment risks include conflict of interest and bias, collusion and conspiracy.
- Phrase Must Be Read In Its Broadest Sense By Facilitators](56fd4055-b412-4058-a33a-57d4d1b54181).
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This Tenet is based on the rationale of protecting against misalignment risks that arise when a stakeholder occupies two or more ecosystem roles, each of which has different mandates and inner incentives. Such misalignment risks include conflict of interest and bias, collusion and conspiracy.
- Phrase Must Be Read In Its Broadest Sense By Facilitators](56fd4055-b412-4058-a33a-57d4d1b54181).
